summary: Decent audience‑recorded tape with some board hiccups, highlighted by Vince‑sang covers of Baba O'Riley and Tomorrow Never Knows.
review: The show is an average outing – the first set holds up well enough while the second set offers a few moments, most notably Vince Welnick’s takes on Baba O'Riley and Tomorrow Never Knows. Recording-wise the tape is mainly audience‑sourced with a problematic soundboard feed for part of set 2, making the overall sound fair but listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is modestly praised (covers and decent first set) while recording quality is mixed with board issues, leading to an overall average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Primarily audience recording; a soundboard source exists for set 2 but the first couple of songs on that feed have problems. No major distortion, but overall clarity is uneven.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is solid enough; second set has its moments, especially the two cover songs, though overall the performance isn’t described as a standout.

band_member_comments.Keys: Vince Welnick’s vocals on Baba O'Riley and Tomorrow Never Knows are highlighted as strong contributions.
